description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.11-alpine Docker image and a before_script that installs gcc, musl-dev, git and curl via apk. Define three stages: prepare, build, and release. In the prepare stage add a test job that runs `go test ./... -coverprofile=coverage.out` and `go tool cover -func=coverage.out`. In the build stage add a build-linux job that executes `GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build`, and a build-macos job that runs `GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build`; both jobs store the resulting `guild` binary as an artifact named `guild_$CI_JOB_ID` on success. In the release stage add a release-linux job that runs `GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags "-w"` and a release-macos job that runs `GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags "-w"`; both jobs publish the `guild` binary as an artifact named `guild` and are triggered only on tag pushes.
